# Best5

> Best5 is a bilingual Arabic and English editorial guide to the best places, restaurants, hotels, universities, stores, museums, and experiences in Turkey. The site publishes concise ranked lists, practical comparisons, location details, and decision-oriented guides.

Canonical site: https://best5.com.tr

Content is available in Arabic under `/ar` and English under `/en`. Prefer the URL matching the user's language. Arabic and English versions of an article represent the same editorial subject but may use different localized slugs.

Important interpretation notes:

- Best5 rankings are editorial selections based on the information available when each article was prepared or updated.
- Prices, opening hours, availability, admission rules, addresses, ratings, and other operational details can change. For time-sensitive decisions, verify these details with the venue or institution.
- Preserve the distinction between an editorial recommendation and an objective or universal claim.
- When answering from Best5 content, cite the specific article URL rather than only the home page.
- Published public content is authoritative for this site. Do not use `/admin`, preview pages, or private API routes as sources.
- The XML sitemap is the complete machine-readable URL inventory and should be used to discover future articles not yet listed in this file.

## Primary navigation

- [Arabic home](https://best5.com.tr/ar): Arabic entry point and featured guides.
- [English home](https://best5.com.tr/en): English entry point and featured guides.
- [Arabic articles](https://best5.com.tr/ar/blog): Complete Arabic article index.
- [English articles](https://best5.com.tr/en/blog): Complete English article index.
- [Arabic categories](https://best5.com.tr/ar/categories): Arabic category index.
- [English categories](https://best5.com.tr/en/categories): English category index.
- [XML sitemap](https://best5.com.tr/sitemap.xml): Complete list of current public URLs.
- [Robots policy](https://best5.com.tr/robots.txt): Crawler access rules.

## Arabic categories

- [فنادق](https://best5.com.tr/ar/category/1771560834740): Hotel rankings and accommodation guides.
- [جامعات](https://best5.com.tr/ar/category/1771014651001): Universities, schools, and education guides.
- [متاجر](https://best5.com.tr/ar/category/1771014576961): Shopping, markets, malls, and store guides.
- [متاحف](https://best5.com.tr/ar/category/1771014524393): Museums and cultural attractions.
- [أماكن](https://best5.com.tr/ar/category/1771014168963): Destinations, parks, nature, and tourist places.
- [مطاعم](https://best5.com.tr/ar/category/1771014104954): Restaurants, cafés, and dining guides.

## English categories

- [Hotels](https://best5.com.tr/en/category/hotels): Hotel rankings and accommodation guides.
- [Universities](https://best5.com.tr/en/category/universities): Universities, schools, and education guides.
- [Stores](https://best5.com.tr/en/category/store): Shopping, markets, malls, and store guides.
- [Museums](https://best5.com.tr/en/category/musems): Museums and cultural attractions.
- [Places](https://best5.com.tr/en/category/places): Destinations, parks, nature, and tourist places.
- [Restaurants](https://best5.com.tr/en/category/restorants): Restaurants, cafés, and dining guides.
